name: Anomalous Resonance
oracle_text:
Whenever an artifact enters under your control, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.
At the beginning of your end step, if three or more artifacts entered under your control this turn, draw two cards.
flavor_text: The dungeon hums at a frequency only the desperate can hear.
design_notes: A blue rare enchantment that rewards artifact-heavy strategies. The first ability is a loot trigger — each artifact entering gives you card filtering, keeping hands smooth without raw card advantage. The second ability is the payoff: if you can get three artifacts entering in a single turn (via tokens, cheap artifacts, or Salvage chains), you draw two cards at end step — genuine card advantage. The threshold of three artifacts is achievable but requires real deckbuilding commitment. At 4 CMC it comes down early enough to matter but isn't free. Supports the WU and UR artifact archetypes as a build-around. Blue is primary in both card draw and enchantments-that-draw.
